stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the MAPt?

options.a: The point in an instrument approach procedure which ensures that the minimum obstacle clearance is not infringed in case of a missed approach procedure.
options.b: The earliest point in an instrument approach at which a pilot must conduct a missed approach procedure.
options.c: The point at which the missed approach must be initiated if the required visual reference to continue the approach has not been established.
options.d: The point at which you can expect the ATC to issue a landing clearance.
